Bathroom Tiling Enquiry

NEW

"Hello, you've reached Johnson Tiling. I'm Katie, the digital assistant. How can I help?"

"I need my bathroom retiled — about 12 square metres. Can you quote?"

"I'd be happy to help. Can you confirm your postcode and what type of tiles you're considering — ceramic, porcelain, or natural stone?"

WhatsApp sent to tiler in 2.8 seconds

The Real Cost of Missed Tiling Calls

Every missed call is a job going to your competitor. Here's what tilers lose every single week.

Detailed Enquiries Missed on the Job

You're knee-deep in a bathroom renovation, hands covered in adhesive. Phone rings — it's a new £4,500 bathroom job. You can't answer. By 6pm, they've booked someone else. You lost a week's worth of work.

46% of tiling calls missed

Builder & Developer Voicemail Black Hole

A builder calls about a 4-bathroom new build. You don't answer. They need quotes by 5pm for project scheduling. They move to the next tiler on their list. You lost a £12,000 repeat contract.

78% hire first responder

Commercial Deadlines Pass You By

Hotel manager calls about a 20-room retiling with a 3-week deadline. You're on another site. They need immediate confirmation. By the time you call back, the contract's signed. Lost £12,000+ project.

62% of calls unanswered

The average UK tiler misses 4 calls per day = £45,600 in lost revenue per year

Source: UK SME Communications Survey 2025 — based on £4,500 avg bathroom value, 30% conversion rate

Read our 24/7 call answering guide

How Katie Works for Tilers

Three simple steps from missed call to booked job. No apps to check. No dashboards to monitor.

01

Katie Answers Instantly

Customer calls your number. Katie picks up in under 2 rings with your branded greeting: 'Hello, Johnson Tiling. I'm Katie, how can I help?' — 24/7, even when you're on the job or it's after hours.

02

She Captures Project Details

Katie asks the right questions: project type, room size, tile type, budget, timeline, commercial or residential, builder or direct customer. She identifies builder and commercial enquiries and marks them as priority.

03

Tiling Job Alert in 3 Seconds

A structured message lands on your phone: name, number, postcode, project details, urgency, and estimated value. Tap Accept, Call Back, or Decline. Commercial and builder jobs are flagged for immediate attention.

See the full process in detail

"I used to miss 3-4 calls a day while I was tiling — bathrooms, kitchens, commercial jobs. In my first month with whoza.ai, I captured 11 jobs I would have missed, worth £8,200. It cost me £59. That's not a cost, that's a weapon."

Questions Tilers Ask

Everything you need to know about AI call answering for tiling businesses.

How much does AI call answering cost for tilers?

whoza.ai starts at plans start at £59/month for the Starter plan. That's less than one small bathroom tiling job. You get unlimited AI call answering, WhatsApp delivery, and a 7-day free trial with no credit card required. Most tilers recover the cost within a week by capturing just one missed enquiry.

How does AI call answering work?

Katie uses advanced AI to answer your business calls 24/7, capture customer details, and send structured alerts to your WhatsApp. Read our complete guide to AI call answering for UK trades to learn more.

Can Katie handle builder and developer enquiries?

Absolutely. Builder and developer enquiries are automatically tagged as priority in your WhatsApp alert. Katie captures project scope, timeline, site address, and contact details — everything you need to quote fast. These are your biggest repeat customer base, so they get VIP treatment.

What information does Katie collect from tiling customers?

Katie captures: full name, phone number, postcode, project type (bathroom, kitchen, floor, wall, commercial), room size, tile type preference, budget range, timeline, commercial or residential, builder or direct customer, and how they found you. She also asks about underfloor heating, mosaic work, and repair vs full installation.

Will customers know they're talking to AI?

Katie introduces herself as your digital assistant with a natural, professional voice. Most callers appreciate the instant response over voicemail or a ringing phone. In user surveys, 89% of callers are satisfied with the AI experience — they just want their tiling project booked fast.

Does it work with my existing business phone number?

Yes. You simply set up call forwarding from your existing tiling business number to your whoza.ai number. Your customers dial the same number they've always used — Katie just answers when you can't. Setup takes under 10 minutes.

How quickly can I get set up?

Most tilers are live and capturing calls within 30 minutes. Sign up, connect your number via call forwarding, set your greeting and business details, and Katie starts answering immediately. No hardware, no IT team, no technical knowledge required.

Can Katie handle commercial tiling projects?

Yes. Commercial enquiries (offices, retail, hotels) are automatically marked as urgent. Katie captures project size, deadline, site contact, and whether it's a new build or renovation. She flags tight-deadline projects so you can respond immediately and secure the contract.

What happens if Katie can't handle a complex enquiry?

Katie is trained to recognise when a call needs human attention. For complex custom projects or unusual materials, she takes a detailed message and flags it for your immediate callback. You receive the full context in WhatsApp so you can call back prepared with all the details.

Still have questions? Read our complete AI call answering guide or compare all pricing plans. See the 7 best AI call answering services compared for UK trades.
